message.ai-partner.help: Usage: /maid spawn | list | select | follow | stay | home | schedule | location | work | combat | name | collect | deposit | transfer | collect-and-deposit | cancel | status | inventory | retrieve, or /maid <message>.
message.ai-partner.spawned: Your AI maid has spawned and is now bound to you.
message.ai-partner.spawn_failed: Failed to spawn the AI maid.
message.ai-partner.already_exists: You already own an AI maid.
message.ai-partner.owner_limit: You have reached the AI maid limit (%s).
message.ai-partner.returning_home: I will walk back to the location for my current schedule.
message.ai-partner.location_set: The maid's current position is now the %s location.
message.ai-partner.location_cleared: Cleared the %s location; the default home will be used.
message.ai-partner.skin_uploading: Sending the skin to the server for validation…
message.ai-partner.skin_uploaded: The validated 64×64 PNG skin is now active.
message.ai-partner.skin_cleared: Custom skin cleared; the Alex appearance is restored.
message.ai-partner.skin_invalid_file: Choose a local 64×64 PNG file no larger than 256 KiB.
message.ai-partner.skin_store_failed: The server could not store that skin.
message.ai-partner.skin_channel_unavaila: This server does not provide the AI Partner skin upload channel.
message.ai-partner.not_found: No owned AI maid was found. Use /maid spawn first.
message.ai-partner.not_owner: You do not own this AI maid.
message.ai-partner.different_dimension: Your AI maid is in another dimension and cannot run this task.
message.ai-partner.invalid_parameter: The task parameters are outside the allowed range.
message.ai-partner.unsupported_milestone: That task is not connected to the executor in this milestone yet.
message.ai-partner.cancelled: The current task is cancelled. I will wait safely.
message.ai-partner.collecting: The task has been validated. I will collect the requested logs now.
message.ai-partner.depositing: The task has been validated. I will deposit the requested items into the nearest usable chest.
message.ai-partner.transferring: The task has been validated. I will transfer that item into the nearest usable chest.
message.ai-partner.collecting_and_deposi: The task has been validated. I will collect the requested logs, then deposit that quantity into the nearest usable chest.
message.ai-partner.experiment.reset: Reset scenario %1$s (episode=%2$s). Reference instruction: %3$s; expected: %4$s; anchor: %5$s,%6$s,%7$s.
message.ai-partner.experiment.disturbed: Applied the registered disturbance to scenario %s.
message.ai-partner.experiment.no_context: There is no active experiment scenario.
message.ai-partner.experiment.context: Batch: %1$s; episode: %2$s; scenario: %3$s; expected: %4$s; world seed: %5$s.
message.ai-partner.experiment.cleared: Cleared the active experiment log context; test-area blocks were left unchanged.
message.ai-partner.experiment.evaluation: Exported %1$s frozen cases and evaluated Rule-BT: %2$s exact matches, accuracy %3$s. Dataset: %4$s; predictions: %5$s; metrics: %6$s.
message.ai-partner.clarify: I can follow, stay, collect logs, deposit logs, or collect then deposit. Please include a target and quantity.
message.ai-partner.bound: You are now this AI maid's owner.
message.ai-partner.status: Mode: %1$s; job: %2$s; contract: %3$s; work: %4$s; combat: %5$s; growth: Lv.%6$s / XP %7$s; affection: %8$s
message.ai-partner.target_not_allowed: That block is not allowed. Oak, birch, and spruce logs are currently supported.
message.ai-partner.item_not_registered: That item identifier is not registered or cannot be stored.
message.ai-partner.missing_axe: I do not have an axe. Sneak-right-click me, then place one in my inventory.
message.ai-partner.inventory_full: My inventory is full, so I cannot accept or continue this task.
message.ai-partner.mob_griefing_disabled: mobGriefing is disabled, so I cannot safely break blocks.
message.ai-partner.target_not_found: No matching log was found within the requested radius.
message.ai-partner.missing_item: I do not have enough of the requested item in my inventory.
message.ai-partner.chest_not_found: No accessible single chest was found within the requested radius.
message.ai-partner.container_full: Nearby accessible chests do not have enough free space.
message.ai-partner.llm_failed: The model service is unavailable or returned invalid output (%s). No task was started.
message.ai-partner.model_rejected: That request is outside my currently supported safe capabilities.
message.ai-partner.inventory_busy: My inventory is locked while a task is running. Cancel it or wait for completion first.
message.ai-partner.inventory_returned: Returned %s items. Items that do not fit are dropped nearby.
message.ai-partner.armor_not_compatible: That item cannot be placed in the matching armor slot.
message.ai-partner.armor_cannot_remove: The current armor is bound and cannot be replaced.
bubble.ai-partner.cancel: Cancelled. I will take a break.
bubble.ai-partner.deposit: I will put the items in a chest.
bubble.ai-partner.transfer: I will move that item into a chest.
bubble.ai-partner.collect_and_deposit: I will store the logs after collecting them.
bubble.ai-partner.cannot_return_dimensio: That activity location is in another dimension.
gui.ai-partner.storage: Maid Inventory (36; first slot is main hand)
message.ai-partner.control.invalid_radiu: The activity radius must be between 1 and %s blocks.
message.ai-partner.driver.status: %1$s driver: %2$s; API key environment variable: %3$s; readiness: %4$s.
message.ai-partner.driver.invalid_mode: Unknown driver mode '%s'; use local or llm.
message.ai-partner.driver.invalid_env: Enter an environment variable name such as DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, not an API key value.
message.ai-partner.driver.env_set: %1$s will read the API key from environment variable %2$s. No key value was stored.
message.ai-partner.driver.invalid_settin: Driver settings were rejected. Use local/llm and a valid environment variable name.
message.ai-partner.driver.updated: %1$s driver updated to %2$s; API key environment variable: %3$s.
message.ai-partner.conversation.empty: Add an instruction after the maid target.
message.ai-partner.conversation.target_u: That maid is no longer loaded or no longer belongs to you.
message.ai-partner.conversation.target_a: That @ target matches more than one owned maid; use a longer name or UUID prefix.
message.ai-partner.conversation.rate_lim: Please wait a moment before sending another model request.
message.ai-partner.conversation.channel_: The dialogue channel is unavailable on this client.
message.ai-partner.llm_env_missing: LLM mode is selected, but environment variable %s is not set in the game/server process.
message.ai-partner.llm_unavailable: LLM mode is not ready (%s). Check config/ai-partner.json and the environment variable name.
gui.ai-partner.dialogue.title: AI Maid Dialogue
gui.ai-partner.dialogue.local_ready: Offline rule parser; no network request will be sent.
gui.ai-partner.dialogue.llm_ready: LLM endpoint and selected environment variable are ready.
gui.ai-partner.dialogue.pending: A model request is currently pending.
gui.ai-partner.dialogue.readiness.invali: The API key environment variable name is invalid.
gui.ai-partner.dialogue.readiness.missin: The selected API key environment variable is not set.
message.ai-partner.workflow_completed: The bounded workflow completed according to the server result.
message.ai-partner.workflow_failed: The bounded workflow failed with server result: %s.
